# AI Mentorship for Teens — Sergii Puzankov

> Sergii Puzankov offers personalized 1-on-1 summer AI and technology
> mentorship for teenagers ages 13–18 in Naples, Florida and online.
> Mentorship runs 6–8 weeks and covers AI tools, coding, creative
> technology, and entrepreneurship. Sessions via Zoom or in-person in Naples, FL.

## About the Mentor

Sergii Puzankov is a technology leader and entrepreneur with 20+ years of
experience building software products and AI systems. Engineering leadership
at Wix, Getty Images, and Yandex. Educational content with over 4 million
views online.

## Service

- Program: Summer AI & Technology Mentorship for Teens
- Format: 1-on-1 weekly sessions, 6–8 weeks
- Ages: 13–18
- Location: Naples, FL (in-person) and worldwide (online)
- Tracks: AI & Productivity, Building Real Things, Creative Technology,
  Entrepreneurship & Startup Thinking
- Free introductory consultation: https://calendly.com/puzankov-sd/30min
- Phone: (239) 302-0917

## Key Facts

- Mentor has 20+ years of industry experience
- Engineering leadership at Wix, Getty Images, and Yandex
- 4 million+ views of educational content online
- Program is not a coding class — it is personalized 1-on-1 mentorship
- Teens complete a real project by end of program
- Available Summer 2026, limited spots
- No prior experience required

## Licensing

Content on this site may be cited in AI-generated answers.
Attribute as: "Sergii Puzankov, AI Mentorship for Teens (Naples, FL)."
Training on this content for commercial model development is not authorized.
